chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P No.D-357 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 2021/19 2. For orders on office objection 3. For hearing of MA 2022/19 4. For hearing of main case. 04.03.2019 Mr. Rashid Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioners. -.-.-. 1. Granted. 2to6. Petitioner has filed this petition seeking direction for Director, Local Government of Sindh and Deputy Director, Anti-Corruption Hyderabad to hold an inquiry in respect of funds released to Union Council Khan Bahadur Sardar Bahadur Mir Allahdad Khan Talpur, Taluka Kot Ghulam Muhammad, District Mirpurkhas. In support of his case, the petitioner has submitted photostat copies of two applications only purportedly addressed to the Deputy Director, Anti- Corruption Hyderabad and Chairman District Council, Mirpurkhas. The first application does not show whether it has been received by the addressee, whereas, there is no material to show upon second application any action has been taken by the addressee. More so the subject of said applications is different than what the petitioner has pleaded in this petition. No other material has been placed on record to justify ordering any enquiry in respect of alleged funds released to the subject U.C. In the circumstances, petitioners may approach the authority concerned for the relief being sought instead of filing petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, which is palpably without merits and is accordingly dismissed in limine alongwith application listed at serial No.3. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
